text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: One day, as I'm walking around the academy...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Oh nooo!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: A-a-at this rate, Opera O is going to—

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I just performed a divination predicting that a
catastrophic disaster, too terrible for words to
describe, will befall Opera O!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
W-we have to find her right now and get her to
safety! We can't waste any time!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Ah, it's you two! Your timing couldn't have been
any better! Why, I was just about to start
rehearsing an all-new opera!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
P-please, you have to listen! Disaster will soon
strike! You have to get to somewhere safe!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Disaster? Ha ha ha! Pray tell—what exactly is this
impending disaster you speak of?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: I-it's um... one that goes wham and swoosh, like crash, and uh...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
A horrendous fortune poised to wreak
cataclysmic levels of havoc is upon you! With a
bonus of blizzards, lightning, volcanic eruptions,
even...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Ha ha ha! Fear not! Such measly threats will only
serve to enhance my performance!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Come, let those grim thoughts burden you no
further. Join me on stage, and allow me to win
back your lovely smiles with my brilliance.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
O-okay... Oh, what's this... wonderful feeling?
This ray of light I feel in my chest, driving away
my fears.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
...Wait! Th-th-th-that's not right! Ohhh... How are
we supposed to save Opera O now?!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Don't worry! I just performed another divination
and have now discovered a way to save her!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
To cut to the chase—we must fight evil with evil...
Doto, you must become a demon!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Huh?! A d-demon?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Yes! You must become a demon far more
terrifying than any catastrophe, and then frighten
Opera O into hiding! Can you do this?!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I-I can! If it means Opera O will be saved, I'll do
anything!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Understood. Then, I shall call upon a demon to
possess your body! Hold these incense sticks with
both hands and keep this slab of butter plus this
rice cracker in your mouth.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Hummm... Dracula caterpillar specter... Crying
carrot, flappy fried rice!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: ...Doot! ...Installing—Demon.exe!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Doto, what is the matter? Don't be shy, come
here and—

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
...I, I am no Doto! Da-dum! I am a yokai—wait no,
an evil tanuki possessing this girl's body! Da-dum!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Ha ha ha! Another adorable little tanuki wants to
make friends!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I-I'll put a curse on you if you don't leave right
now! I'll give you a tanuki's tail, or... I'll turn you
into a tea kettle!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Ah, a tale of shapeshifting, I see! Ha ha ha! You
have my attention!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
N-no... Y-you should fear me! I have even more
terrible curses up my sleeve, I swear!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Th-this girl here, she might never be able to see
your beautiful face anymore, you know?! I-if that
happens... she's gonna be very sad!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
...Oh? Dear Tanuki, do you mean that you can
sense Doto's trepidation?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: O-of course! She's so worried! If you don't run away soon, her heart's gonna... sniffle... burst!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Ha ha ha! Duly noted! After all, it is true that a
curtain of darkness would fall upon this world if
anything were to happen to me.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Huh?! Y-you're going to go?!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Yes. I shall heed your warning and take my leave.
Adieu!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Th-thank goodness! Opera O is saved!
choice_data_list: Looks to me like you got your message across.
Looks to me like you got your message across.

I wonder what would've happened if you had let
her be.

I wonder what would've happened if you had let
her be.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Th-thank goodness! Opera O is saved!
choice_data_list: Looks to me like you got your message across.
Looks to me like you got your message across.

I wonder what would've happened if you had let
her be.

I wonder what would've happened if you had let
her be.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Hnnngh? Are you saying... the demon had no
effect on Opera O's decision-making?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Ehehe... I-in any case, I'm glad she's fine!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Hm?! Speaking of which, Trainer... Aren't you
standing right where Opera O was a moment ago?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
That's when a bicycle furiously speeds by me,
going right over the puddle of water next to
where I'm standing.

text_block_list.name: Doto and Fukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Ah...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Showered in muddy water and stares of pity, I
come to terms with my misfortune.
